title: SI Send Message Response
description: Brand agent's response to a user message

adcp_version.description: Release-precision AdCP version this party is operating at (VERSION.RELEASE, e.g. "3.0", "3.1", "3.1-beta"). On a request: the buyer's release pin — the seller validates against its supported_versions and returns VERSION_UNSUPPORTED on cross-major mismatch, or downshifts to the highest supported release within the same major. On a response: the release the seller actually served — clients SHOULD validate the response against that release's schema, not against their pin. Patches are not negotiated; surface them as build_version on capabilities for operational visibility. When omitted, falls back to adcp_major_version (deprecated) or server default.

ui_elements.description: Visual components to render (DEPRECATED: use surface instead)

mcp_resource_uri.description: MCP resource URI for hosts with MCP Apps support (e.g., ui://si/session-abc123)

session_status.description: Current session status. On a successful response, one of: active, pending_handoff, or complete. Terminated sessions return error codes (SESSION_NOT_FOUND or SESSION_TERMINATED) instead of a success response.

handoff.description: Handoff request when session_status is pending_handoff

type.description: Type of handoff: transaction (ready for ACP checkout) or complete (conversation done)

intent.description: For transaction handoffs: what the user wants to purchase

context_for_checkout.description: Context to pass to ACP for seamless checkout

conversation_summary.description: Summary of the conversation leading to purchase

applied_offers.description: Offer IDs that were applied during the conversation
